title: Klarna to close its Tel Aviv office site
full_text: Klarna Bank AB has taken the decision to close the Tel Aviv site in Israel in the coming months. Our strategy is to focus on strengthening our commercial and operational presence in our key commercial markets where our merchants and partners are located. All 31 of the talented and highly valued Klarna staff employed in Tel Aviv will be given the possibility to continue to work in other Klarna locations in Sweden or Germany.
